title: Retro Textures (v2.0)
description: Minecraft but it feels like alpha!
body:
# Retro Textures - feels like alpha!
_By Fred MSJD_

AVAILABLE ON MODRINTH: https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/retro
AVAILABLE ON CURSEFORGE: https://curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/retro

Get in to a new Minecraft world with standard new features but in a RETRO feel! Many textures are changed to be from the early days of Minecraft, and you can experience it right now with this cool resource pack!

**NOW WORKS FOR VERSIONS FROM 1.14 TO 1.21!**
_Activate the Programmer Art resource pack (make sure to place Retro Textures on top) for an even more old feel!_
![Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/792920c95bb86ac3340453358ff19ad4a8ee0cd8.png)

All textures are from Vanilla Tweaks.
